title.en: A group of eternal to Dao, mythical to Dao real...

content.en:
Whoa!!!!

One by one, the Eternal Dao Realm separated, and went to attack and kill those demon seeds.

And the top few country lords went to find the demon seed that the country lord of the thousand mountains turned into, if it was before, they were naturally not the opponents of the country lord of the thousand mountains, but now, the country lord of the thousand mountains turned into a demon seed, and he couldn't perform the secret technique of the dao seed, even if the body was stronger, but the combat power was still weakened.

Therefore, they were still able to surround and kill the demon seed that the Lord of the Thousand Mountains had turned into.

......

"Demon Seed!"

Ye Tian encountered a demon seed, and he was frantically killing those fleeing Mythical Dao Realm and Eternal Dao Cultivators, they were like ants in front of the demon seed, and their desperate attacks were not even tickling.

Ye Tian shuttled over, directly trapped the opponent with the Dao Secret Technique, the Ruin Sun Prison, and then pierced the opponent's body with a single shot, killing him.

"Thank you, senior!"

A group of eternal to Dao, mythical to Dao realm powerhouses, grateful.

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and then went to other places.

As time passed, Ye Tian killed one demon seed after another 25 demon seeds.

But soon, there was an Eternal Dao Realm asking for help, obviously encountering a powerful demon seed, and he couldn't deal with it.

Ye Tian was very close to the other party, and directly shuttled over to help.

Soon, he saw an Eternal Dao Realm who was fighting with a demon seed, but he was beaten and his whole body was shattered, and the power of the demon seed invaded the opponent's Eternal Dao Seed, and the situation was very critical.

Ye Tian immediately made a move and killed this demon seed.

This demon seed should be comparable to the powerhouse of the Eternal Dao Body Xiaocheng Realm, and its strength is indeed not weak.

And the Eternal Dao Realm just now was just an Eternal Dao Body that had reached the peak of entry, so naturally he couldn't defeat this demon seed.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian made a move, directly beat the other party, and quickly killed this demon seed.

And that Eternal Dao Realm was very shocked, he always thought that Ye Tian was just lucky to obtain the Eternal State Decree and become an Eternal Country Lord, but in fact, his strength was not good.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian's combat power was so powerful, and he belonged to the middle rank among many country lords!

This Eternal Dao Realm was healing here, and he was temporarily unable to participate in the battle, while Ye Tian continued to kill the demon seed.

......

With the support of Ye Tian and the others, the Eternal Dao Realm of the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance had hope and began to counterattack the demon seeds.

A protracted battle and slaughter began between the two sides, but many of the weaker were left to hide on the edge of the Thousand Hills Realm Alliance, hoping that the battle would not spread here.

The strength of the demon seed is still not as good as their eternal Dao realm, as the years go by, the demon seeds have gradually been killed a lot, and many demon seeds have re-hid in the abyss of the demon seed, which is their home field.

And the Eternal Dao Realm really didn't dare to kill into the Demon Seed Abyss, and those top country lords themselves had a lot of problems with the Eternal Dao Seed, if they fought in the Demon Seed Abyss for too long, there was really a risk of Demon Seeding.

Especially when he was hit hard by the demon seed there, the chance of the demon seed being turned into a demon seed was as high as more than seventy percent.

Therefore, if the demon seed escapes back to the demon seed abyss, they will not chase and kill, but will only help the Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance repair the formation at the entrance to the demon seed abyss.

After a period of time, the demon seed crisis gradually cleared, and all that remained was to kill the demon seed of the Thousand Mountains Lord.

If you don't kill this demon seed, then the crisis will not be truly eliminated.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the Thousand Mountains Country, which was beaten into ruins, and the void was filled with a terrifying demon seed aura.

And the six lords joined forces to suppress the lord of the Thousand Mountains, but the lord of the thousand mountains was still fighting frantically, and the aura of the demon seed was getting stronger and stronger.

Whew!!!!

Many lords have descended, as well as some Eternal Dao realms.

"What's the matter, the six of you still can't kill the Thousand Mountains Country Lord Demon Seed?"

A lord of the kingdom was shocked.

One of the six country lords said: "At the beginning, the Thousand Mountains Country Lord Demon Seed was not so powerful, but the more fierce it became, it was very wrong, and we are almost unable to suppress it now, you all come to help." "

"Good!"

One by one, the Lords of the Realm, as well as the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm whose strength was above the Eternal Dao Body Realm Xiaocheng Realm, came to help, but the weaker ones retreated, so as not to interfere with their battle.

After all, the strength is too weak, and he can't even hurt the main demon seed of the Thousand Mountains Country.

Ye Tian also made a move, but he was not the main force.

Thundered!!!!

Many Eternal Dao Realm shots, and the attack power covered the main demon seed of the Thousand Mountains Country, and the main demon seed of the Thousand Mountains Country continued to collapse, but the demon seed aura on the opponent's body became more and more terrifying.

This situation is too wrong, but now we must kill the Demon Seed of the Thousand Mountains Country.

Under the crazy attacks of many Eternal Dao Realms, there were also Eternal Dao Realms of the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance who came to help, and in the end, they completely killed the Lord Demon Seed of the Thousand Mountains Kingdom.

And after killing the Demon Seed of the Lord of the Thousand Mountains Country, a black vine grew out of the Demon Seed on his body.

This strange scene made many Eternal Dao Realms stunned, and they didn't dare to approach.

"If that's the case, this vine can transform the Eternal Dao Realm Demon Seed, then you can't stay, destroy it!" another country lord proposed.

"Okay, let's strike together and destroy it!"

Many Eternal Dao realms struck again.

However.

Under their frantic attack, the body of the Lord Demon Seed of the Thousand Mountains Country was annihilated, but this vine was still fine.

"Such a tenacious vine, our strength can't destroy 220 at all, I'm afraid that only the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods can destroy it!"

"What then, do you want to bring it back?"

"Who is going to take it? I don't dare!"

In the end, I still let an Eternal Dao Realm take it.

However, this Eternal Dao Realm was still a little afraid, so he walked over cautiously, grabbed this black vine, and put it away and took it away.

"It seems to be okay, hurry up and return to the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods Alliance!"

Immediately.

They left immediately, and they didn't stay here in the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance, they left directly.

On the road.

These Eternal Dao Realms are on their way quickly, however, they haven't left the Renshan Realm Alliance for too long.

The Eternal Dao Realm, who had taken the black vine, suddenly stopped.

"Not good!"

His face began to change, and the aura of demon seeds permeated his body.

The next moment, he turned into a demon seed.

"Kill!"

The demon seed transformation cannot be reversed, and the other Eternal Dao Realms can only kill it with their hands.

This Eternal Dao Realm was not strong, so he killed him with a single move.

After killing this Eternal Dao Realm, the black vine spread out from its Eternal Dao Seed.

This strange scene made them dare not touch it at all.

"Just let it stay here, and seal it away!"

A lord of the country proposed.
